title: Sciodaphyllum awa
taxonomy: Sciodaphyllum awa is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It belongs to the genus Sciodaphyllum, which is a group of plants native to Central and South America. The species is classified as a woody climber, with its habitat ranging from lowland to montane forests. The classification of Sciodaphyllum awa is further divided into its binomial nomenclature, which includes the species name 'awa' and its genus name 'Sciodaphyllum'. This binomial nomenclature helps in identifying and distinguishing the species from others in the same genus and family.
